should_trigger: Which /phx command should I use to review code? — direct question about command choice
When should I use /phx:plan versus /phx:quick? — asking to compare workflow commands
What skill handles N+1 query detection? — navigating to specific skill
How do I know if I need /phx:investigate? — understanding when to use a command
Which command should I run for Oban worker debugging? — asking for command recommendation
should_not_trigger: I'm building a feature but don't know which workflow to start — should use intent-detection (work request routing)
Show me all the plugin commands and what they do — should use intro (comprehensive walkthrough)
There's a bug in my LiveView form not rendering correctly — should use investigate (specific bug report)
Optimize my database queries for performance — should use perf (specific domain task)
/help — built-in CLI command, explicitly excluded from help skill
What's the right pattern for Phoenix plug middleware? — should use phoenix-contexts (reference skill)
Deploy this app to production with Docker — should use deploy (specific workflow skill)
